-fx-accent.description: The accent color for focused elements. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-alignment.appliesTo: FlowPane, GridPane, HBox, VBox, StackPane, TilePane, Labeled, TextField
-fx-alignment.description: The alignment of the content within the container.

-fx-alternative-column-fill-visible.description: Whether alternating column fills are visible.

-fx-alternative-row-fill-visible.description: Whether alternating row fills are visible.

-fx-arc-height.description: The vertical diameter of the arc at the four corners of the rectangle.

-fx-arc-width.description: The horizontal diameter of the arc at the four corners of the rectangle.

-fx-arrows-visible.description: Whether the arrow buttons are visible.

-fx-axis-sort-policy.description: The policy for sorting data along the axis.

-fx-background.description: Background paint for controls, typically derived from -fx-base. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-background-color.description: A series of paint values separated by commas, applied as layered background fills.

-fx-background-image.description: A series of image URIs used as background images.

-fx-background-insets.description: Insets for each background fill layer. Four values: top, right, bottom, left.

-fx-background-position.description: Position of each background image within the region.

-fx-background-radius.description: Corner radii for each background fill layer.

-fx-background-repeat.description: Repeat style for each background image.

-fx-bar-gap.description: The gap between bars within a category.

-fx-base.description: The base color for the UI theme. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-blend-mode.description: The blend mode used to blend this node into the scene.

-fx-block-increment.description: The amount by which to adjust the value when the track is clicked.

-fx-body-color.description: Body color for controls like buttons. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-border-color.description: A series of paint values for border color of each border layer. Four values: top, right, bottom, left.

-fx-border-image-repeat.description: Repeat style for each border image.

-fx-border-image-slice.description: Slice values for each border image, dividing the image into nine regions.

-fx-border-image-source.description: A series of image URIs for border images.

-fx-border-radius.description: Corner radii for each border layer.

-fx-border-style.description: Border style for each border layer. Supports none, solid, dotted, dashed, segments().

-fx-bounds-type.description: The method used to compute the bounds of the text.

-fx-cell-size.description: The cell size. Height for vertical ListView/TreeView/TableView, width for horizontal ListView.

-fx-clockwise.description: Whether pie slices are laid out clockwise.

-fx-close-tab-animation.description: The animation used when closing a tab.

-fx-collapsible.description: Whether the TitledPane can be collapsed.

-fx-color.description: A derived color used for many control backgrounds. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-color-label-visible.description: Whether the color label text is visible in the button.

-fx-column-halignment.description: The horizontal alignment of nodes within each column of a vertical FlowPane.

-fx-column-resize-policy.description: The column resize policy for the table.

-fx-content-display.description: The positioning of the graphic relative to the text.

-fx-content-padding.description: Amount of padding in the content area.

-fx-context-menu-enabled.description: Whether the context menu is enabled for this WebView.

-fx-create-symbols.description: Whether data point symbols are created.

-fx-cursor.description: The type of cursor to display. Inherits.

-fx-display-caret.description: Whether the text caret is displayed.

-fx-effect.description: An effect to apply to the node, such as DropShadow or InnerShadow.

-fx-ellipsis-string.description: The string to display when text is truncated.

-fx-end-margin.description: The margin between the axis end and the last tick mark.

-fx-faint-focus-color.description: A transparent version of the focus color. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-fill.description: The fill paint of the shape.

-fx-fill-height.description: Whether children are resized to fill the full height of the HBox.

-fx-fill-width.description: Whether children are resized to fill the full width of the VBox.

-fx-fit-height.description: The height of the bounding box within which the source image is resized to fit.

-fx-fit-to-height.description: Whether the content should be resized to fit the height of the viewport.

-fx-fit-to-width.description: Whether the content should be resized to fit the width of the viewport.

-fx-fit-width.description: The width of the bounding box within which the source image is resized to fit.

-fx-fixed-cell-size.description: Fixed cell size. A value greater than zero enables fixed cell size mode.

-fx-focus-color.description: The color used for the focus ring. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-focus-traversable.description: Whether this node can receive keyboard focus via tab traversal. Default is true for most controls.

-fx-font.description: Shorthand property for font-size, font-family, font-weight and font-style. Inherits.

-fx-font-scale.description: The font scale factor for the web content.

-fx-font-smoothing-type.description: The type of font smoothing to use.

-fx-gap-start-and-end.description: If true, half the space between ticks is left at the start and end.

-fx-graphic.description: An image URI to display as the graphic for this labeled node.

-fx-graphic-text-gap.description: The gap between the graphic and the text.

-fx-grid-lines-visible.description: Whether grid lines are visible for debugging layout.

-fx-halignment.description: The horizontal alignment of the separator line.

-fx-hbar-policy.description: The policy for showing the horizontal scroll bar.

-fx-hide-delay.description: The delay before the tooltip is hidden after the mouse leaves.

-fx-highlight-current-paragraph.description: Whether the current paragraph is highlighted.

-fx-highlight-fill.description: The fill color for selected text background.

-fx-highlight-text-fill.description: The fill color for selected text.

-fx-horizontal-grid-lines-visible.description: Whether horizontal grid lines are visible.

-fx-horizontal-zero-line-visible.description: Whether the horizontal zero line is visible.

-fx-image.description: The image to display. Relative URLs are resolved against the stylesheet URL.

-fx-indent.description: The amount of space multiplied by tree item level for left margin.

-fx-indeterminate-bar-animation-time.description: The time in seconds for one indeterminate bar animation cycle.

-fx-indeterminate-bar-escape.description: Whether the indeterminate bar escapes the track bounds.

-fx-indeterminate-bar-flip.description: Whether the indeterminate bar flips direction on each cycle.

-fx-indeterminate-bar-length.description: The length of the indeterminate bar.

-fx-indeterminate-segment-count.description: The number of segments in the indeterminate spinner.

-fx-initial-delay.description: The delay before the spinner starts repeating when a button is held.

-fx-inner-border.description: Inner border paint for controls. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-label-line-length.description: The length of the line connecting pie slices to their labels.

-fx-legend-side.description: The side of the chart where the legend is displayed.

-fx-legend-visible.description: Whether the chart legend is visible.

-fx-line-spacing.description: The spacing between lines of text.

-fx-major-tick-unit.description: The unit distance between major tick marks.

-fx-managed.description: Whether this node's layout will be managed by its parent.

-fx-mark-color.description: Color for marks/icons in controls like checkboxes. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-mark-highlight-color.description: Highlight color for marks. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-max-height.description: The maximum height of the region.

-fx-max-page-indicator-count.description: The maximum number of page indicators to display.

-fx-max-width.description: The maximum width of the region.

-fx-min-height.description: The minimum height of the region.

-fx-min-width.description: The minimum width of the region.

-fx-minor-tick-count.description: The number of minor ticks to place between major ticks.

-fx-minor-tick-length.description: The length of minor tick marks.

-fx-minor-tick-visible.description: Whether minor tick marks are visible.

-fx-opacity.description: The opacity of the node, in the range [0.0, 1.0].

-fx-open-tab-animation.description: The animation used when opening a tab.

-fx-orientation.appliesTo: FlowPane, ListView, ScrollBar, Separator, Slider, SplitPane, TilePane, ToolBar

-fx-outer-border.description: Outer border paint for controls. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-padding.description: Padding values. Four values: top, right, bottom, left.

-fx-page-fill.description: The background fill color of the web page.

-fx-page-information-alignment.description: The alignment of the page information label.

-fx-pannable.description: Whether the content can be panned by clicking and dragging.

-fx-pie-label-visible.description: Whether pie slice labels are visible.

-fx-pie-stroke-color.description: The stroke color for pie slices.

-fx-pie-to-label-line-one-length.description: The length of the first segment of the pie label line.

-fx-pie-to-label-line-stroke-color.description: The stroke color for lines connecting pie slices to labels.

-fx-pie-to-label-line-two-length.description: The length of the second segment of the pie label line.

-fx-position-shape.description: If true, the shape is centered within the region. Otherwise positioned at source position.

-fx-pref-column-count.description: The preferred number of text columns.

-fx-pref-columns.description: The preferred number of columns for a horizontal TilePane.

-fx-pref-height.description: The preferred height of the region.

-fx-pref-row-count.description: The preferred number of text rows.

-fx-pref-rows.description: The preferred number of rows for a vertical TilePane.

-fx-pref-tile-height.description: The preferred height of each tile.

-fx-pref-tile-width.description: The preferred width of each tile.

-fx-pref-width.description: The preferred width of the region.

-fx-preserve-ratio.description: Whether to preserve the aspect ratio when scaling the image.

-fx-progress-color.description: The color of the progress indicator.

-fx-prompt-text-fill.description: The fill color of the prompt text.

-fx-repeat-delay.description: The delay between repeated increments/decrements when a button is held.

-fx-rotate.description: The angle of rotation in degrees. Zero is at 3 o'clock, positive is clockwise. Rotation is about the center.

-fx-row-valignment.description: The vertical alignment of nodes within each row of a horizontal FlowPane.

-fx-scale-shape.description: If true, the shape is scaled to fit the size of the region.

-fx-scale-x.description: The scale factor along the X axis, about the center.

-fx-scale-y.description: The scale factor along the Y axis, about the center.

-fx-scale-z.description: The scale factor along the Z axis, about the center.

-fx-selection-bar.description: Background color for selected items. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-selection-bar-non-focused.description: Background color for selected items when the control is not focused. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-shadow-highlight-color.description: Color used for shadow highlights. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-shape.description: An SVG path string. The region takes on that shape instead of a rectangle.

-fx-show-delay.description: The delay before the tooltip is shown.

-fx-show-duration.description: The duration for which the tooltip is shown.

-fx-show-tick-labels.description: Whether tick mark labels are displayed.

-fx-show-week-numbers.description: Whether week numbers are shown in the calendar popup.

-fx-side.description: The side of the plot that this axis is on.

-fx-skin.description: The fully qualified class name of the Control's Skin.

-fx-smooth.description: Whether anti-aliasing is used when rendering the shape.

-fx-snap-to-pixel.description: Whether this region rounds position/spacing and ceils size values to pixel boundaries.

-fx-snap-to-ticks.description: Whether the slider value snaps to the nearest tick mark.

-fx-spacing.description: The amount of space between children.

-fx-start-angle.description: The angle in degrees at which the first pie slice starts.

-fx-start-margin.description: The margin between the axis start and the first tick mark.

-fx-strikethrough.description: Whether the text has a strikethrough line.

-fx-stroke.description: The stroke paint of the shape.

-fx-stroke-dash-array.description: Dash pattern for the stroke. Alternate values represent opaque and transparent segments.

-fx-stroke-dash-offset.description: The offset into the dash pattern at which the stroke begins.

-fx-stroke-line-cap.description: The decoration applied to the ends of unclosed subpaths and dash segments.

-fx-stroke-line-join.description: The decoration applied where path segments meet.

-fx-stroke-miter-limit.description: The limit for the miter join style.

-fx-stroke-type.description: Where the stroke is applied relative to the boundary of the shape.

-fx-tab-max-height.description: The maximum height of each tab.

-fx-tab-max-width.description: The maximum width of each tab.

-fx-tab-min-height.description: The minimum height of each tab.

-fx-tab-min-width.description: The minimum width of each tab.

-fx-tab-size.description: The number of spaces that a tab character represents.

-fx-table-cell-border-color.description: Border color for table cells. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-text-background-color.description: Text color for use on colored backgrounds. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-text-base-color.description: Base text color. (Modena looked-up color, not in official CSS spec)

-fx-text-fill.description: The fill color of the text.

-fx-text-origin.description: The origin for positioning text vertically.

-fx-text-overrun.description: The strategy for handling text that overflows the available space.

-fx-tick-label-fill.description: The fill color for tick mark labels.

-fx-tick-label-font.description: The font for tick mark labels.

-fx-tick-label-gap.description: The gap between tick marks and their labels.

-fx-tick-labels-visible.description: Whether tick labels are visible on the axis.

-fx-tick-length.description: The length of tick marks on the axis.

-fx-tick-mark-visible.description: Whether tick marks are visible on the axis.

-fx-tick-unit.description: The value between each major tick mark.

-fx-tile-alignment.description: The default alignment of each child within its tile.

-fx-title-side.description: The side of the chart where the title is displayed.

-fx-tooltip-visible.description: Whether a tooltip showing the page number is displayed on page indicators.

-fx-translate-x.description: The translation along the X axis in pixels.

-fx-translate-y.description: The translation along the Y axis in pixels.

-fx-translate-z.description: The translation along the Z axis in pixels.

-fx-underline.description: Whether the text has an underline.

-fx-unit-increment.description: The amount by which to adjust the value when an arrow button is clicked.

-fx-use-content-height.description: Whether the preferred height equals the content height.

-fx-use-content-width.description: Whether the preferred width equals the content width.

-fx-use-system-menu-bar.description: Whether the system menu bar is used (macOS).

-fx-valignment.description: The vertical alignment of the separator line.

-fx-vbar-policy.description: The policy for showing the vertical scroll bar.

-fx-vertical-grid-lines-visible.description: Whether vertical grid lines are visible.

-fx-vertical-zero-line-visible.description: Whether the vertical zero line is visible.

-fx-view-order.description: Alters the rendering and picking order of a node within its parent without reordering the children list.

-fx-wrap-text.description: Whether text should wrap when it reaches the edge of the container.

transition.description: Shorthand for transition-property, transition-duration, transition-timing-function, and transition-delay. First duration is transition-duration, second is transition-delay.

transition-delay.description: The delay before the transition starts. Negative values cause the transition to start as if already running.

transition-duration.description: The duration of the transition, not including the optional delay.

transition-property.description: The CSS property to which the transition is applied. Use 'all' for all properties, 'none' to disable, or a specific -fx-* property name.

transition-timing-function.description: The easing function used to calculate intermediate transition values.
